info.title: eosc API
info.description: A single platform for providers to onboard their organization, register and manage their resources.

tags.name: catalogue
tags.description: Operations about Catalogues and their resources

tags.name: public
tags.description: General methods related to Public resources

put.summary: Updates the TrainingResource assigned the given id with the given TrainingResource, keeping a version of revisions.
Updates the Resource assigned the given id with the given Resource, keeping a version of revisions.

put.description: Suspends a Provider and all its resources

put.summary: Updates the InteroperabilityRecord with the given id.

get.summary: Returns a specific ticket for the authenticated user.

put.summary: Updates the DeployableService assigned the given id with the given DeployableService, keeping a version of revisions.

put.description: Updates the Datasource with the given id.

put.summary: Updates the Configuration Template with the given id.
Updates the Configuration Template Instance with the given id.

post.summary: Create a new Configuration Template Instance.
